title: Keto Australian Lamb Burger
description: A flavorful and savory lamb burger infused with australian flavors and spices, ideal for a low-carb keto diet. Serve with a side of your favorite vegetables.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine ground lamb, minced garlic, and red pepper flakes. Mix well.
Grill lamb patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, toast low-carb buns on the grill.
Assemble burgers by spreading a dollop of your favorite keto mayo on the bottom bun, followed by a lamb patty, and finally the top bun.
